query:
SELECT 
  q.id, q.quotationNumber, q.quotationMode,
  qi.id as itemId, qi.productId, qi.productName, qi.productSku,
  qib.id as batchId, qib.variantId, qib.variantCode, qib.variantName, qib.quantity, qib.unitPrice
FROM quotations q
LEFT JOIN quotationItems qi ON q.id = qi.quotationId
LEFT JOIN quotationItemBatches qib ON qi.id = qib.quotationItemId
WHERE q.quotationNumber = 'QUO-20260216-005';
